ADROIT.title: Achievement
ADROIT.description: This card has been enhanced with dungeon intelligence. It performs better than expected.
CLONE.title: Apex Predator Achievement
CLONE.description: A perfect copy created by the dungeon's replication systems.
CORRUPTED.title: Assassin! Achievement
CORRUPTED.description: Tainted by the dungeon's dark energy. Stronger, but at a cost.
FAVORED.title: B'sieging Achievement
FAVORED.description: The viewers love this card. It performs better when the audience is watching.
GLAM.title: Bandit Achievement
GLAM.description: Polished for the broadcast. This card looks amazing on stream.
GOOPY.title: Battlefield Construction Achievement
GOOPY.description: Covered in dungeon slime. Disgusting, but surprisingly effective.
IMBUED.title: Bisected Achievement
IMBUED.description: Infused with the essence of the current dungeon floor.
INSTINCT.title: Bitchmeat! Achievement
INSTINCT.description: Enhanced by pure survival instinct. The dungeon sharpens those who survive.
MOMENTUM.title: Boom! Achievement
MOMENTUM.description: Gains power from continuous forward progress through the dungeon.
NIMBLE.title: Borough Boss! Achievement
NIMBLE.description: Lightened and optimized for faster play. The audience barely sees it coming.
PERFECT_FIT.title: Boss Babe Achievement
PERFECT_FIT.description: Tailored perfectly to your crawler class. Like it was made for you.
ROYALLY_APPROVED.title: Bully and a Thief Achievement
ROYALLY_APPROVED.description: Stamped with the Primus seal of approval. Carries the authority of the dungeon overlords.
SHARP.title: Cannonball! Achievement
SHARP.description: Sharpened on the bones of fallen crawlers. Cuts deeper than before.
SLITHER.title: Cascadia's Turquoise Taco Achievement
SLITHER.description: Moves with an unnatural, snake-like fluidity.
SLUMBERING_ESSENCE.title: Celestial Loot Achievement
SLUMBERING_ESSENCE.description: Contains sleeping energy that awakens under the right conditions.
SOULS_POWER.title: Celestial Orgy of Chaos Achievement
SOULS_POWER.description: Infused with the souls of previous crawlers. Their power lives on.
SOWN.title: Charge of the Light Brigade Achievement
SOWN.description: A seed of potential has been sown into this card. It grows stronger over time.
SPIRAL.title: Chickenshit Exploit Achievement
SPIRAL.description: This card spirals back, creating echoes of its effect.
STEADY.title: Cliffhanger Achievement
STEADY.description: Proven through countless dungeon encounters. Reliable and consistent.
SWIFT.title: CockBlock Achievement
SWIFT.description: Enhanced for speed by dungeon modification. Plays faster than normal.
TEZCATARAS_EMBER.title: Columbia House Achievement
TEZCATARAS_EMBER.description: A spark from the Floor Architect's forge. Burns with creative destruction.
VIGOROUS.title: Crab Chowder Achievement
VIGOROUS.description: Infused with the raw vitality of a seasoned dungeon crawler.
